name: 意味深长
xml:
from turtle import *
import random

bgcolor('orange')
speed(0)

up()
goto(-400,-200)
down()
begin_fill()
fd(800)
rt(90)
fd(200)
rt(90)
fd(800)
rt(90)
fd(200)
rt(90)
end_fill()

color('white','white')
up()
goto(-240,-200)
fd(100)
down()

begin_fill()
fd(10)
rt(90)
fd(30)
rt(90)
fd(10)
rt(90)
fd(30)
rt(90)
end_fill()
fd(5)
dot(20)

up()
goto(-138,-230)
down()
rt(90)
pensize(3)
fd(20)

up()
goto(-132,-230)
down()
fd(20)
ht()

speed(2)
up()
lt(180)
goto(-115,-230)
down()
circle(20,180)

speed(0)
up()
lt(90)
fd(40)
rt(90)
down()
st()

pensize(5)
bk(16)
fd(56)
bk(6)
lt(90)
begin_fill()
circle(10,360,3)
end_fill()
pensize(2)

color('cyan','cyan')
up()
goto(400,300)
down()
dot(400)
rt(111)
ht()

for i in range(100):
    up()
    goto(random.randint(-400,400),random.randint(-200,350))
    down()
    fd(random.randint(5,25))

done()
tags: 其他 海龟 模拟
